headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), your only active ticket.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards are available for next week
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations without ground truth
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket with no due date set — zero-meeting day is the best window to produce a strong first draft. Evals are a key 26.4 deliverable per the Big Rock OKR page.

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock bi-weekly TR page for any action items assigned to you or evals workstream updates needed before next review cycle
must_make_progress.why: Evals adoption is a tracked metric; staying aligned with the bi-weekly cadence avoids surprises

must_communicate_with.about: Align on no-ground-truth evaluation approach — confirm technical feasibility and any model-based scoring assumptions before finalizing the design doc
Coordinate on how evals without ground truth intersect with validation patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and planned template updates

must_report_status.note: Proactively share draft link once a working version exists; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable and the bi-weekly TR will need an update soon

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility into customer escalations. Fix or escalate to IT today.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and MBR dashboard data are inaccessible. The Big Rock OKR page notes March data still needs updating.
AE-1079 has no due date set — consider setting one to create accountability and signal priority to the team.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the Big Rock TR — monitor for any evals dependencies or asks that may land on your plate.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring visibility into escalations (Salesforce) and metrics (Snowflake) so the team isn't operating blind.
outcomes.product_adoption: Advancing the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) directly supports the 26.4 evals deliverable, which is a key lever for agents adoption and quality assurance at scale.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday with zero meetings, emails, or Slack activity — best use of today is deep work on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), your only active ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Urgent housekeeping: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and product metrics — get credentials fixed or escalated. No meetings today.
